eyebrow: Is This Course Right for You?
title: Built for people who are
subtitle: Whether you're just starting or leveling up — this program meets you where you are.

personas.title: Current UI/UX Designers
personas.body: You know the basics but struggle with advanced workflows, design systems, and articulating your design decisions.

personas.title: Graphic Designers
personas.body: You have a strong visual eye but need to learn UX thinking, user research, and product design strategy.

personas.title: Career Changers
personas.body: You're switching from another field and need a structured, beginner-friendly path into UI/UX design.

personas.title: Self-Taught Designers
personas.body: You've learned from YouTube and tutorials but have gaps in your knowledge and no structured portfolio.

personas.title: Freelancers
personas.body: You want to level up your skills to charge premium rates and deliver better work for your clients.

personas.title: Portfolio Builders
personas.body: You need real, impressive case studies that showcase your end-to-end UX process and land interviews.

cta.label: Yes, this is for me - Let's go
